title: liparis clemensiae
intro: Liparis clemensiae is a type of orchid species, specifically a terrestrial orchid native to the Philippines. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Liparis clemensiae include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
